description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style armchair featuring a carved wooden frame with a distressed white finish. The seat, backrest, and armrests are upholstered in a rich, red fabric adorned with an intricate floral pattern, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The armrests are gently curved and partially padded, matching the upholstery of the seat and back. The legs are cabriole-shaped, also finished in distressed white, and add to the antique aesthetic. The backrest is rounded and framed, providing both support and decorative appeal. This armchair exudes a sense of luxury and would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as boutique hotels, sidewalk cafes, or historic neighborhoods.
description: A vintage-style armchair with a carved white wooden frame and red floral upholstery, featuring curved armrests and cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ornate frame, red floral upholstery, and padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved backrest, armrest padding, and the cabriole leg profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full backrest with floral upholstery and the frame's carved details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest curve and leg shape.
attribute_armrest_design: curved wooden frame with padded and upholstered tops
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium-height, framed with floral upholstered panel
attribute_leg_type: carved cabriole wooden legs with distressed finish
